properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I would like to speak About what Jesus has done for me Since I came into contact with Him I had never met A God who transforms He is Wonderful He has done so much for me, I want! I want!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to give this testimony For the glory of God I am not what I should be I am not what I would like to be But one thing is certain I am no longer who I was! x2

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I listened to His Word It touched my heart I cried a lot for my sins and for my life I said, Lord, have mercy on me, I didn't know it And I repented He changed my life, I want! I want!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I don't understand What Jesus has placed in me He makes me always oppose Sin and evil He makes me unable to bear The desires of the world He is Wonderful He has done so much for me, I want! I want!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My heart has been vaccinated Against sin I am not afraid to backslide For a single moment For I have passed from death to life I will praise my God In the assembly of the Saints, I want! I want!
